legs.start_address: South Station, 700 Atlantic Ave, Boston, MA 02110, USA

steps.html_instructions:
Head north on Atlantic Ave toward Summer St
Parts of this road may be closed at certain times or days
Slight right to stay on Somerville Community Path
Slight right to stay on Somerville Community Path
Slight right to stay on Somerville Community Path
Continue straight to stay on Somerville Community Path
Slight left to stay on Somerville Community Path
Turn left onto Somerville Community Path/Somerville Community Path and MBTA Busway
Slight left to stay on Alewife Linear Park
Turn right to stay on Alewife Linear Park
Turn right to stay on Alewife Linear Path
Slight left to stay on Minuteman Commuter Bikeway
Slight right to stay on Minuteman Commuter Bikeway
Turn right to stay on Minuteman Commuter Bikeway
Turn left to stay on Reformatory Branch Trail
Turn left to stay on Reformatory Branch Trail
At the traffic circle, take the 1st exit onto Main St

Continue onto MA-117 W/Great Rd
Continue to follow MA-117 W

Slight right onto Chocksett Rd/Pratts Junction Rd
Continue to follow Chocksett Rd
At the traffic circle, continue straight to stay on Chocksett Rd

Turn right onto Rowley Rd/Rowley Hill Rd
Continue to follow Rowley Hill Rd
Turn right to stay on Justice Hill Rd

Turn right onto MA-140 N/MA-31 N
Continue to follow MA-140 N

Continue onto MA-2A W/E Main St
Continue to follow MA-2A W
Pass by AutoZone Auto Parts (on the left in 4.4 mi)
Turn right to stay on Brooks Village Rd

Turn right onto Partridgeville Rd/E River St
Continue to follow E River St

Continue onto Depot Rd/Wendell
Continue to follow Depot Rd

Turn right onto MA-116 N/Bridge St
Continue to follow MA-116 N

Continue onto Elm St
Pass by M&T Bank (on the right in 0.2 mi)
Slight left to stay on Ashuwillticook Rail Trail

warnings: Bicycling directions are in beta. Use caution – This route may contain streets that aren't suited for bicycling.
